utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi. How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Where are you going on your summer vacation?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Carlsbad, California and my date of journey is from the 16th of June to the 19th of June.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, do you have a price range?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes, my price range is $300 per night.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, do you have any other preferences for your room amenities?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: And it should have a mini-refrigerator and king bed.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, let me check that for you.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: And it should have a pool with a hot tub and a fitness center.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Sure. Please allow me one moment.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I have found three options for you: Cape Rey Carlsbad, Hilton Resort and Carlsbad Seapointe Resort, do you want to know more information?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No, that's it. Thank you so much. Goodbye.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Enjoy and bye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hi, Can you help me find a hotel in Palm Springs, California?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.text: Yes, I can help you book a hotel in Palm Springs California. What days will you be staying?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How many guests will be staying with you?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you have a price limit?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Maybe, About $120 a night. I want to go about that.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you have a preferred user rating or hotel class?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: A hotel class. I know, I'm not even sure what that is. Hey, can you make sure it has free parking and we'd love a continental breakfast.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you have any other amenities that you prefer?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, the room has to have air conditioning. And the room should also have a king bed.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Anything else?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No, I think that's it.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hold on just a second. I found two hotels meeting your specifications. The first one is the Best Western Plus Palms Resort total cost $88 a night . The second hotel is the Inn at Deep Canyon it's $106 a night. Which would you prefer? I will book the hotel for you and email you the itinerary.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Alright, Thank you.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd like help in finding a hotel.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I need one that is in Rochester, New York, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Let me describe a couple of options you can choose from.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That's it.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The first is the Hyatt Regency. It's a 4-star hotel.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: It's $119 per night.

utterances.text: Straightforward property offering free WiFi & hot breakfast plus an indoor pool & fitness center.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: It's $87 per night.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi, how can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like to find hotel for my summer vacation.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What type of amenities are you looking for?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay. What is the price range you are looking at?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: It should be below $300.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay. Let me check.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I was able to find a hotel called The Naples Beach Hotel & Golf Club. This hotel is a victorian era hotel decorated with local art with colorful rooms that include flat-screen TVs, desks, coffeemakers, mini fridges and private patios or balconies with oceanfront viewing. In addition to 7 miles of private beach, There's a tennis center, spa, fitness center and 2 pools. Dining options include a casual full bar and grill, an oceanfront seafood restaurant and a breakfast spot. The cost is around $212 per night.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That sounds great. Thank you so much for your help.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Is there anything else?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No, That's it. Thank you so much.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Goodbye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Bye-bye.

utterances.text: Hi.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright.

utterances.text: So, I have a total of 4 that are actually really expensive and highly rated.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Really expensive? Okay.

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, it's called The Renaissance Nashville Hotel. It is actually 4.4 stars out of 5 and over 627 reviews and priced at $419 a night. It's an upscale hotel with an indoor heated pool and a fitness center, meeting rooms and a grill Eatery.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Oh, wow. That sounds terrific. Definitely something I'm interested in. Is there free parking at the hotel?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Yeah, definitely.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Cool. Is room service available?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Yes, 5-star classroom service.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes, indeed. Alright. Well, that sounds awesome. I think I'll love it.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright, cool. You're all set then. Enjoy your business trip and I hope you have a great day.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Excellent. Thank you very much.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hey. I'm looking for a hotel in Palm Springs.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm looking from June 1st through June 8th.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Is there a particular thing that is most important to you when searching for hotels?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, I'd like to keep it between $150 and $250 a night. This is also for two guests.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd also like at least four-star rating with good customer reviews.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What in-room amenities would you like?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Marriott's Desert Springs Villas.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Featuring balconies or patios, the stylish rooms have kitchenettes, flat-screen TVs and free WiFi. Upgraded 1- and 2-bedroom suites add full kitchens and separate living areas with pull-out sofas. Amenities include 7 pools and a fitness room, plus a grill restaurant and a pool side bar. Guests have access to a golf course, Tennis courts and a Spa at an adjacent sister resort. Parking is complimentary.

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Laid-back rooms with city or bay views have modern suite bathrooms, 42-inch flat-screens, iPod docks and Wi-Fi access as well as tea and coffee making equipment. Upgraded club rooms add sitting areas and access to a rooftop club lounge with complimentary breakfast and snacks. Amenities include a lounge bar and restaurant that serves Californian cuisine plus a 24-hour exercise room, gift shop and a car rental desk. Extensive meeting and event space are available.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Drury Plaza Hotel St. Louis at the Arch. Straightforward rooms come with microwaves, mini fridges and coffeemakers, as well as free Wi-Fi and 37-inch flat-screens. Some have limited views of the Gateway Arch. Hot breakfast is complimentary, as well as drinks and evening snacks. A fitness room and a business center are open 24 hours. Other amenities include an indoor pool and 2 whirlpool tubs.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a great place for you Hotel Pennsylvania.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Across the street from Penn Station and Madison Square Garden, this classic Midtown Manhattan hotel in a 1919 building is a 7-minute walk from the Empire State Building and an 11-minute walk from Times Square. The low-key, traditional rooms come with complimentary WiFi and flat-screen TVs. Upgraded rooms offer mini fridges and access to a club lounge with free continental breakfast. Suites add separate sitting areas. Dining options include a sophisticated bar/grill and a casual lobby cafe. There's also access to a nearby gym with an indoor pool and sauna, plus a business center and 32,000 sq ft of meeting space (including 3 ballrooms).

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Sounds good to me.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Did you have any further questions?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I've no further questions.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Have a great day and stay.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you, bye.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The classic studio suites offer full kitchens and desks, as well as free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, DVD players and iPod docks. Upgraded suites add separate living rooms, and some have boardroom tables. Complimentary perks include a breakfast buffet, a grocery shopping service and an airport shuttle. There's also a fitness room, a hot tub and a deck with BBQs, plus a 24-hour business center and meeting space. A library offers books, DVDs and games.

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How about Renaissance Club Sport Aliso Viejo Laguna Beach Hotel?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: This contemporary hotel is 6.5 miles from Laguna Beach and 9 miles from the historic Mission San Juan Capistrano. The polished rooms and suites have free WiFi, iPod docks and flat-screen TVs with premium channels, Plus coffeemakers and desks with ergonomic chairs. Some rooms feature city views, and some suites add separate living areas with pull-out sofas. The trendy American restaurant/bar features a patio with a fire pit. Other amenities include a refined spa, an outdoor pool and a splash pad, Plus a fitness center and a kids’ club. There are also 4 meeting rooms.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. How much?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: $186 per night.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Book that for me.

utterances.text: How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Well, I'm looking for a hotel. I don't have a hotel in my mind.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, what are the dates, you are planning on staying?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: The daytime planning is between June 16th and June 19th, 2017.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, how many star ratings you are looking for?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm looking for Google star rating which should be first on your list.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What type of amenities are you looking for?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm looking for room amenities which should have a very good king size bed, and should have in-room coffee makers, with a big 40 in SG TV, and should have balcony.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What is the price range you are looking at?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm looking for about $3 $300 per night.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, let me check. I was able to find a hotel called The Naples Beach Hotel & Golf Club. This hotel is a Victorian era hotel decorated with local art with colorful rooms that include flat-screen TVs, desks, coffeemakers, mini fridges and private patios or balconies with oceanfront viewing. In addition to 7 miles of private beach, there's a tennis center, spa, fitness center and 2 pools. Dining options include a casual full bar and grill, an oceanfront seafood restaurant and a breakfast spot. The cost is around $212 per night.

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.text: I don't need anything at the moment. I will call back when I wake up to you, thank you. Goodbye.
